findings.summary: install.sh is functionally complete but has several quality and robustness gaps. All required files are installed correctly with proper permissions and directory structure, but error handling, user experience, and edge-case safety need improvement.
strengths: All 8 files (1 skill, 3 agents, 4 scripts) are installed to correct locations
Target paths follow Copilot CLI conventions (~/.copilot/skills/, ~/.copilot/agents/, ~/bin/)
All executable scripts receive chmod +x at the right time
Directory creation uses mkdir -p correctly before file copies
Strict mode (set -euo pipefail) provides fail-fast behavior

critical_issues.issue: No trap, custom error handler, or cleanup on failure
critical_issues.impact: Users get raw shell errors; partial installs remain without guidance
critical_issues.recommendation: Add trap for ERR with context-aware messages and optional rollback

critical_issues.issue: Auto-exec demo (line 74) replaces installer process without consent
critical_issues.impact: Surprising behavior; users lose shell session
critical_issues.recommendation: Make demo launch optional via flag or prompt

critical_issues.issue: PATH update (lines 59-61) only affects current shell, not persistent
critical_issues.impact: ~/bin not on PATH after new shell; commands fail
critical_issues.recommendation: Detect shell profile and instruct user to persist PATH

critical_issues.issue: No overwrite confirmation for existing files
critical_issues.recommendation: Add backup or confirmation before overwriting

structural_observations: Flat sequential script with no functions (harder to test/reuse)
No preflight validation (source files, writable paths, required commands)
Demo install fallback (cp || ln) suppresses stderr, masking root cause
chmod +x doesn't normalize to explicit mode (755), may retain unsafe bits
No documented exit codes or graceful failure messaging

worker_reports.verdict: Bash-only (not POSIX sh), flat structure, no functions, auto-exec demo, non-persistent PATH
All 8 files installed to correct paths, follows Copilot CLI conventions, complete
All scripts get chmod +x, timing correct, but chmod doesn't normalize modes, symlink chmod follows target
mkdir -p correct and complete, all parents covered, proper ordering before copies
Fail-fast via set -e, but no trap, no custom errors, no rollback, no preflight checks

recommendations_priority: Add trap ERR with context-aware error messages and cleanup guidance
Make demo launch optional (flag or prompt) instead of forced exec
Detect shell profile and instruct user to persist ~/bin in PATH
Add preflight validation (source files exist, target dirs writable)
Consider refactoring into functions for testability
Add overwrite confirmation or backup for existing files
